title: payment-worker OOMKilled debugging
lastMessage: kubectl describe pod payment-worker-7d4f8b9-xk2pl shows OOMKilled as the exit reason. Memory limit is 512Mi but the process is consuming 780Mi at time of kill. We deployed v2.4.1 at 10:00 UTC which introduced a new in-memory cache for payment method lookups with no eviction policy — this is a memory leak. Rolling back to v2.4.0 stopped the restarts immediately.

title: payment-worker heap profiling
lastMessage: Heap dump from v2.4.1 shows PaymentMethodCache retaining 350MB of objects. The cache.put() call in PaymentMethodService.java is missing a size bound or TTL. This is the memory leak introduced in PR #2847. Fix: add maximumSize(10000).expireAfterWrite(5, TimeUnit.MINUTES) to the Caffeine cache builder.

title: Terraform EKS node pool upgrade
lastMessage: Node pool upgraded to 1.29. No incidents related.
